Industrial Intelligence Platform
# AI that turns industrial data into action.
MAGNUS DATA leverages artificial intelligence to connect your machines, analyze production data in real time, and deliver actionable insights — so you can optimize processes, prevent downtime, and boost performance across your entire operation.
[Book a Demo](https://d-sap.tech/contact)[Discover our Platform](https://d-sap.tech/product)
![MAGNUS DATA Dashboard](https://d-sap.tech/assets/dashboard-mockup-CCUJkaB8.jpg)

## A Modular Platform for Industrial Intelligence
Three powerful modules that work together to transform your industrial operations.
### Intelligent Dashboarding
Real-time production KPI visualization, equipment supervision, smart alerts, and automated reporting for better decision-making.
[Learn more ](https://d-sap.tech/product)
### AI Parameter Optimizer
Intelligent process parameter adjustment, continuous performance improvement, loss reduction, and advanced energy optimization.
[Learn more ](https://d-sap.tech/product)
### Industrial Conversational Agent
Interact with industrial data using natural language. Assist operators, explain anomalies, recommend actions — human in the loop.
[Learn more ](https://d-sap.tech/product)
## Why MAGNUS DATA
Built by industrial AI experts, backed by leading institutions.
### Optimize Processes
Fine-tune every parameter of your production lines with AI-driven insights.
### Reduce Downtime
Proactive maintenance and intelligent alerts to prevent unplanned stops.
### Improve Energy Efficiency
Monitor and reduce energy consumption across your entire operations.
### Carbon Footprint Tracking
Establish and monitor your carbon footprint with precision data.
### Human in the Loop
Keep humans at the center of every decision with our conversational AI.
### Proactive Maintenance
Shift from reactive to predictive maintenance strategies.
## Backed by Leading Institutions
Supported by top-tier partners and public institutions.

tavily.answer: SAP is a global enterprise software company founded in 1972, headquartered in Walldorf, Germany. Wellfound, a startup platform, is based in New York City and focuses on connecting individuals with startup jobs. Wellfound has raised $24 million in funding.
